'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 59''' was the fifty-ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 12]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]
*[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]
*[[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]
*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] - [[Coruscant Underworld|The Dark Underbelly]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]]
*[[LOM-series protocol droid/Legends|LOM Protocol Droid]]
*[[M38-series explorer droid|M38 Explorer]]
*Weapons Manufacturers
*[[Yorik-et|Coralskipper]]
